[Theory]

[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 0, 10, 20, 0.5, 5, 10 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 0, 10, 20, 1, 10, 20 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 2, 4, 10, 20, 0.25, 4, 8 })]
